heroHeadline: mRNA Cancer Vaccines Show Durable 6-Year Results at AACR 2026
heroSubtitle: BNT122 pancreatic cancer vaccine keeps ~50% of patients alive and disease-free at 6 years; V940 cuts melanoma deaths 49% at 5 years; AACR 2026 showcases an expanding global mRNA oncology pipeline with new entrants from Asia and novel mRNA-encoded antibody therapeutics.
footerNote: Data sourced from FDA, EMA, WHO, NIH, peer-reviewed publications (NEJM, Science, Nature), AACR 2026 presentations, and institutional analyses. Timeline covers 2020-12-11 to present.
